programs.title: Building Off the Grid
programs.desc: Naturalist builder Cat Taylor builds a remote sanctuary in the piney woods of Northwest Texas; she builds the two-story house using a cob mixture and adds touches of comfort to entertain family members.

programs.title: Building Off the Grid
programs.desc: Professional tree-house builder Michael "Murph" Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington; he enlists his friends to create natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programs.title: Building Outside the Lines
programs.desc: Cappie and Alex create a one-of-a-kind escape by anchoring a sailboat into the South Dakota earth and crafting a three-sided dock for their landlocked boat-loving clients; it's a dry-docked dream with sunset views and zero waves.

programs.title: Building Outside the Lines
programs.sub_title: Historic Granary Becomes a Goat Milk Goods Haven
programs.desc: Cappie and Alex relocate and restore a 120-year-old granary, transforming it into a rustic-yet-functional retail space for goat milk-based products -- honoring their clients' expanding farm with personal touches and plenty of space to grow.

programs.title: Capturing Home
programs.desc: A couple needs help transforming their backyard patio and their dark, dated Tiki room into a bright, beautiful area to hang out.

programs.title: Capturing Home
programs.desc: Their kids finally moved out, and a couple is ready to reclaim their home; they enlist Kate and Amy to help transform their dated family house into a functional, modern dwelling where they can entertain and relish their retirement.
